headline: **MLB Daily Recap: May 9, 2026**
article:
The Houston Astros dominated the Cincinnati Reds, securing a 10-0 victory behind Mike Burrows' 7.0 innings of shutout baseball. In other action, the Colorado Rockies rallied past the Philadelphia Phillies 9-7, led by Hunter Goodman's 4-hit performance, and the Oakland Athletics edged the Baltimore Orioles 4-3.

Injuries continue to plague several teams, with the Milwaukee Brewers placing left fielder Brandon Lockridge on the 10-day injured list due to a right knee laceration and contusion. The Los Angeles Dodgers transferred 2B Tommy Edman to the 60-day injured list, while the Houston Astros placed LHP Bennett Sousa on the 15-day injured list retroactive to May 6, 2026, due to left elbow inflammation.

Several teams made roster moves, including the San Francisco Giants trading catcher Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians for LHP Matt Wilkinson and other considerations. The Baltimore Orioles acquired RHP Enyel Garcia and RHP Maicol Lauriano from the Philadelphia Phillies in exchange for cash.

top_news.title: **Astros Shut Out Reds 10-0**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros dominated the Cincinnati Reds, securing a 10-0 victory. Mike Burrows led the Astros' pitching effort, throwing 7.0 innings with 6 strikeouts and 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Rockies Rally Past Phillies 9-7**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies secured a 9-7 victory over the Philadelphia Phillies, marking a comeback win for the Rockies. Hunter Goodman led the Rockies' offense with a 4-hit performance, including a home run and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Athletics Edge Orioles in Thrilling 4-3 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Oakland Athletics secured a narrow win over the Baltimore Orioles, with Jacob Lopez earning the win and Hogan Harris securing the save.

top_news.title: **Angels Fall Short in Toronto**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Angels suffered a 0-2 loss to the Toronto Blue Jays, with Kazuma Okamoto leading the team in batting with 1 hit and 1 RBI in 3 at-bats. Dylan Cease earned the win for the Blue Jays, pitching 7.0 innings with 10 strikeouts and 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Rays Shut Out by Red Sox in Thrilling Match**
top_news.summary: The Boston Red Sox secured a 0-0 victory over the Tampa Bay Rays, marking a hard-fought win for the home team.

top_news.title: **Brewers Place Lockridge on 10-Day IL**
top_news.summary: The Milwaukee Brewers have placed left fielder Brandon Lockridge on the 10-day injured list due to a right knee laceration and contusion.

top_news.title: **Giants Acquire LHP Matt Wilkinson in Trade**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants have made a move to bolster their pitching staff, acquiring left-handed pitcher Matt Wilkinson from the Cleveland Guardians in exchange for catcher Patrick Bailey. Wilkinson joins the Giants' organization after being traded.
